incident_summary.what_happened: PowerShell executed with obfuscated command line from an Office parent process.

detection_analysis.trigger_reason: The detection likely matched encoded PowerShell execution with suspicious parent-child process chain.

behavior_analysis.assessment: Execution pattern is consistent with scripted post-exploitation or phishing payload staging.
gaps: No network destination observed in provided data

risk_assessment.rationale: Encoded command and Office parent are strong suspicious indicators, but outcome is unconfirmed.

recommended_investigation_steps: Decode and review the PowerShell command safely.
Collect full process tree for the affected host.
Review EDR telemetry for network connections by powershell.exe.
Check user activity and email artifacts around execution time.
final_soc_note: Prioritize triage within high-severity queue and validate script intent before containment actions.
